description: Clinical care, research, administration, and support across human and animal health systems

personality_overlay.notes: Research focus, hierarchical structure, complex rare cases, publishing pressure
Team-based, relationship-heavy, routine breadth, less specialization
Autonomy, direct patient relationships, entrepreneurial responsibility
Protocol-heavy, structured hierarchy, mission-driven, fixed compensation
Adaptive, tech-comfortable, independent, reduced physical diagnostic cues
Deep focus, long-range thinking, discovery-oriented, publication-driven
Commercial focus, innovation, cross-functional teams, product lifecycle
Deep long-term relationships, low patient volume, high personal service
Resourcefulness, independence, generalist scope, isolation tolerance
